zh.St. James Parish Churchyard, Denchworth,: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾丹華斯聖 加也 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury於1271年出生在英國英格蘭爾諾波利時，他的父親John de Hyde26歲，母親Ellen De Baguley24歲。他於大約1295年與Margaret Davenport在英國爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1364年在英國爾諾波利享年93歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾丹華斯聖 加也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of various places so called in Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Hampshire, and Middlesex. They were named with Old English hīd ‘hide (of land)’, a variable measure of land, differing from place to place and time to time, and seems to have been originally fixed as the amount necessary to support one (extended) family (Old English hīgan, hīwan ‘household’). The surname may also be topographic for someone living on (and farming) a hide of land. The Hyde family has been in Leinster, Ireland, since the early 13th century and one family has been established in the county of Cork since the 16th century. The name was Gaelicized as both Dalaithíd and de hÍde. Compare Hyder .

variants.name: Dollarhide
meanings: Irish: possibly an altered form of de la Hyde (see Hyde ), which was a prominent surname in Leinster from medieval times onward. Compare Dollahite .

History: Francis Dollahide, born c. 1650–60 in County Dublin, Ireland, was the ancestor of Americans with the surname Dollahide, Dollahite, and Dollarhide. In 1680 he was transported to MD for some youthful misdemeanor. He appears to have been an educated man and rose to be an important landowner and politician, serving in the Lower House of the MD legislature as an elected representative for Baltimore County from c. 1705 to 1721.

variants.name: Hyder
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): status name or topographic name for one who lived on or possessed a hide of land, from Middle English hide + the locative suffix -er. This is a characteristically southeastern English name, synonymous with Middle English atte hide elsewhere (see Hyde ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury was born in 1271, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Hyde, was 26 and his mother, Ellen De Baguley, was 24. He married Margaret Davenport about 1295, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1364, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, at the age of 93, and was buried in St James' Church, Denchworth, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury est né en 1271, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Hyde, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ellen De Baguley, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Davenport environ 1295, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1364, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterré à St James' Church, Denchworth, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norburyが1271年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーで生まれた時，父John de Hydeは26歳，母Ellen De Baguleyは24歳であった。約1295年にイギリスチェシュアイアでMargaret Davenportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1364年にイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーで93歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアデンチウオルススト ジャムス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St. James Parish Churchyard, Denchworth,: 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 덴ch워스 스트 자메스' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury(이)가 1271년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Hyde(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen De Baguley(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1295년 영국 체실르에서 Margaret Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1364년 영국 체실르 노르버이에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 덴ch워스 스트 자메스' c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Davenport aproximadamente 1295, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. ru.St. James Parish Churchyard, Denchworth,: ст джемес' чурч, денчворт, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury родился в 1271 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Hyde было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen De Baguley, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Davenport около 1295 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1364 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности ст джемес' чурч, денчворт, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
